---
title: "Blogs & Newsletters"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Blogs & Newsletters

## Sources surveillées

### Blogs techniques

| Blog | URL | Fréquence | Type |
|------|-----|-----------|------|
| latent.space | `latent.space` | Hebdomadaire | Interviews, analyses |
| Simon Willison | `simonwillison.net` | Quotidien | LLM, agents, tools |
| Anthropic Blog | `anthropic.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Modèles, research |
| OpenAI Blog | `openai.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Modèles, research |
| Google AI Blog | `blog.research.google` | Irrégulier | Research |
| Hugging Face Blog | `huggingface.co/blog` | Hebdomadaire | Modèles, open source |
| Mistral Blog | `mistral.ai/news` | Irrégulier | Modèles |
| Ollama Blog | `ollama.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Local LLMs |

### Newsletters

| Newsletter | URL | Fréquence | Source RSS |
|------------|-----|-----------|------------|
| The Batch | `deeplearning.ai/the-batch` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| TLDR AI | `tldr.tech/ai` | Quotidien | RSS |
| Import AI | `importai.substack.com` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| Ahead of AI | `magazine.sebastianraschka.com` | Mensuel | RSS |
| Last Week in AI | `lastweekin.ai` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| The Sequence | `thesequence.substack.com` | Quotidien | RSS |

### Agrégateurs

| Source | URL | Fréquence |
|--------|-----|-----------|
| Hacker News | `news.ycombinator.com` | Temps réel |
| Papers With Code | `paperswithcode.com` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/MachineLearning | `reddit.com/r/MachineLearning` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/LocalLLaMA | `reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA` | Quotidien |

## Pipeline RSS

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    RSS[Feeds RSS] --> PARSE[Parser feedparser]
    PARSE --> FILTER[Filtrage mots-clés]
    FILTER --> SCORE[Scoring pertinence]
    SCORE --> DEDUP[Déduplication]
    DEDUP --> FORMAT[Formatage Markdown]
    FORMAT --> FEED[Page .qmd]
    
    style RSS fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
    style FEED fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
```

## Mots-clés de filtrage

| Catégorie | Mots-clés |
|-----------|-----------|
| Agentic | `agent`, `agentic`, `autonomous`, `tool calling`, `function calling` |
| LLMs | `GPT`, `Claude`, `Gemini`, `Llama`, `Mistral`, `Qwen`, `DeepSeek` |
| Inférence | `vLLM`, `SGLang`, `TensorRT`, `Ollama`, `llama.cpp` |
| RAG | `RAG`, `retrieval`, `GraphRAG`, `knowledge graph`, `embedding` |
| MCP | `MCP`, `model context protocol` |
| Code | `code agent`, `coding assistant`, `IDE`, `SWE-bench` |
| Hardware | `GPU`, `H100`, `B200`, `TPU`, `LPU`, `Groq` |

<!-- BLOG_FEED_START -->
### Last Week in AI #341 - Musk loses to OpenAI, Google's IO updates, OpenAI solves Erdős
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 27 May 2026
- **Score** : 3
- **Résumé** : Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion Suit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman, Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-341-musk-loses-to

### Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : 2 years after our first coverage, we return with Modal's other cofounder to explore why Agent Experience is working now, and everything they have learned building the new agent cloud....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/modal2026

### Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/native-speed-vllm-transformers-backend

### How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/cars24

### How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/managing-ai-investments-in-agentic-era

### LWiAI Podcast #246 - Gemini 3.5 + Omni, Musk Loses, OpenAI vs Erdős
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 26 May 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Google unveils AI model Gemini 3.5 and AI agent Gemini Spark, Omni turns images, audio, and text into video, Musk loses OpenAI court battle...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-246-gemini-35-omni

### LWiAI Podcast #243 - GPT 5.5, DeepSeek V4, AI safety sabotage
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Mon, 04 May 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Our 243rd episode with a summary and discussion of last week&#8217;s big AI news!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-243-gpt-55-deepseek

### LWiAI Podcast #242 - ChatGPT Images 2.0, Qwen 3.6 Max, Kimi-K2.6
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Thu, 30 Apr 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : ChatGPT&#8217;s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text , Alibaba Drops Qwen 3.6 Max Preview , SpaceX is working with Cursor...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-242-chatgpt-images

### LWiAI Podcast #237 - Nemotron 3 Super, xAI reborn, Anthropic Lawsuit, Research!
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Mon, 16 Mar 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Nemotron 3 Super: An Open Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE for Agentic Reasoning, Another XAI Cofounder Has Left, Anthropic Sues Department of Defense...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-237-nemotron-3-super

### [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Thinky's first full LLM release is a banger and bonus: it's open weights!...
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-thinkys-inkling-975b-a41b

### 5 Trends That Defined AI Engineering at World’s Fair 2026
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : At this year's AIE World&#8217;s Fair, AI engineering entered a new phase: building systems around agents, rather than just building with agents....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/aiewf26trends

### [AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : a quiet day lets us fact check some numbers against the sound of silence of Claude Code reporting......
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-codex-usage-up-10x-in-6-months

### [AINews] OpenAI launches GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Codex becomes ChatGPT superapp
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Fri, 10 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : A big day for OpenAI....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-openai-launches-gpt-56-solterraluna

### Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-16T20:19
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Chinese AI lab Moonshot AI announced Kimi K3 this morning, describing it as their "most capable model to date, with 2.8 trillion parameters". It's currently available via their website and API, but an...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/16/kimi-k3/#atom-everything

### Quoting Thibault Sottiaux
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-16T17:45
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : On file deletions. We’ve investigated a handful of reports where GPT-5.6 unexpectedly deleted files. 
What we have  found is that this most commonly occurs when:

Full access mode is enabled and codex...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/16/bad-codex-bug/#atom-everything

### Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid)
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-16T00:33
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Tool: Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid)
        While exploring the codebase for the newly open-sourced Grok CLI coding agent I came across <a...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/16/grok-mermaid/#atom-everything

### What building Shippy taught us about building agents
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 15 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/allenai/shippy-tech-blog

### Why teens deserve access to safe AI
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/why-teens-deserve-access-safe-ai

### GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 15 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/unlocking-self-improvement-gpt-red

### How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-sales-teams-use-codex

### How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-data-science-teams-use-codex

### Getting started with ChatGPT
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Fri, 10 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/academy/getting-started

### LWiAI Podcast #245 - TML-Interaction, Claude For Legal, Sam Altman on Stand
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 20 May 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API, Thinking Machines drops a new, highly responsive model designed for humanlike interactions in real time, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-245-tml-interaction

### Last Week in AI #340 - OpenAI vs Musk + Microsoft, DeepSeek v4, Vision Banana
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 05 May 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : First week of Musk v. Altman, OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal, DeepSeek previews new AI model that &#8216;closes the gap&#8217; with frontier models, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-340-openai-vs-musk

### LWiAI Podcast #238 - GPT 5.4 mini, OpenAI Pivot, Mamba 3, Attention Residuals
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 01 Apr 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : OpenAI ships GPT-5.4 mini and nano, faster and more capable but up to 4x pricier, DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games | The Verge, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-238-gpt-54-mini-openai

<!-- BLOG_FEED_END -->
